violations.description: LIGHTING (1 pts): Some light shileds noted damaged in the kitchen.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some floor areas under equipment noted in need of deep cleaning. Some vent covers noted in need of cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained. Some cutting boards noted not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some ceiling tiles noted damaged and some vent covers noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
